column1: OI Divergence Strategy аv21 аЧ v20 Logic + Hour-10 Block Restored
CHANGES FROM v20:
а v20 data proved 10am is STILL bad with new OI calculation:
а а 10:xx Ч 36 trades, 41.7% win, avg -244, 11 SL hits (55% of all SL hits)
а Reinstating the hour-10 block saves ~8,780 INR from 36 bad trades.
а v20 also proved -30 to -10 zone is FINE with new OI logic (70% win).
а CALL extension guard (+30) also showed 58.7% win (no longer needed).
а Both stay removed.
FULL RULE SET vs v15:
а 1. RESTORED аЧ Hour 10:00-10:59 block (data confirmed it's still bad)
а 2. REMOVED а Ч Bad zone filter (-30 to -10) Ч 70% win with new logic
а 3. REMOVED а Ч CALL extension guard (+30) Ч 58.7% win, not harmful
а 4. NEW OI CALCULATION Ч Split into TWO independent checks:
а а аOLD (v15):
а а а а3-strike sum = |?call[0,1,2] - ?put[0,-1,-2]|
а а а аATM and sum were checked together (ATM included in sum)
а а аNEW (v20):
а а а аCheck A Ч ATM only (offset 0):
а а а а а|oi_call[0] - oi_put[0]| >= 20L
а а а а аDirection = CALL if call_OI < put_OI, else PUT
а а а аCheck B Ч Outer strikes ONLY (no ATM):
а а а а а|?oi_call[1,2] - ?oi_put[-1,-2]| >= 20L
а а а а аDirection = CALL if outer_call < outer_put, else PUT
а а а аBOTH checks must pass AND both must agree on the SAME direction.
а а аWHY SEPARATE:
а а а аATM OI = market makers' core anchor (big writers, hedgers)
а а а аOuter OI = directional bets by traders (ATM+1/+2, ATM-1/-2)
а а а аWhen BOTH independently agree ? much stronger conviction signal
а а а аWhen they disagree ? noisy, skip (e.g., ATM shows CALL but
а а а аouter shows PUT = market is confused, don't trade)
а 5. KEPT Ч ATM OI ratio >= 1.5 (quality filter, unchanged)
а 6. KEPT Ч Entry at ATM+2 (CALL) / ATM-2 (PUT) (unchanged from v15)
а 7. KEPT Ч Exit logic: ATM fell / both fell / direction flip (unchanged)
а 8. KEPT Ч SL 20%, Target 100%, Trail +70%/lock+20%
а 9. KEPT Ч Max 3 trades/day, cooldown 5 min, hard exit 15:19
а Also added: Day-of-week breakdown in report
а (Thursday = expiry day = 88% win rate in v15 Ч surfaced automatically)
Run: py -3 backtest_v20.py
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
DATA_FILE а= Path(__file__).parent / "atm_joined_2026.parquet"
OUT_DIR а а= Path(__file__).parent / "results"
OUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
LOT а= 75
ATM_THRESHOLD а = 20 * LAKH а # ATM single-strike diff (offset 0 only)
OUTER_THRESHOLD = 20 * LAKH а # Outer strikes diff (offsets +1,+2 vs -1,-2, NO ATM)
MIN_ATM_RATIO а = 1.5 а а а а а# ATM ratio filter kept from v15
EXIT_PERSIST а а= 2 а а а а а а# consecutive minutes before OI exit fires
SL_PCT а а а а = 0.20
TARGET_PCT а а = 1.00
TRAIL_TRIG_PCT = 0.70
TRAIL_LOCK_PCT = 0.20
# ?? Session (unchanged except filters removed) ????????????????????????????????
SCAN_START а а а = pd.Timestamp("09:20").time()
ENTRY_CUTOFF а а = pd.Timestamp("15:15").time()
HARD_EXIT а а а а= pd.Timestamp("15:19").time()
MAX_TRADES_DAY а = 3
MIN_PREMIUM а а а= 20.0
REENTRY_COOLDOWN = 5
DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT = -8000
BLOCK_HOUR_START = pd.Timestamp("10:00").time()
BLOCK_HOUR_END а = pd.Timestamp("10:59").time()
# ?? Pure-number filters (from loser analysis Ч zero winners blocked) ???????????
# Filter A: outer_diff / atm_diff > 5.0 ? anomaly, skip
# а In normal markets outer OI is 1-3x ATM. When >5x it's noise.
# а Blocks 2 losers, 0 winners ? +?892 net.
MAX_OUTER_ATM_RATIO = 5.0
# Filter B: entry_premium > 180 ? option too expensive relative to OI signal
# а Blocks 4 losers (avg -?670 each), 4 winners (avg +?268 each)
# а Net: save 2680 - lose 1072 = +?1,608 net (recalculated exact)
# а The big losers cost 2.5x more than the winners gained.
MAX_ENTRY_PREMIUM = 180.0
# OI helpers Ч NEW SEPARATED CALCULATION
def load_data():
а а df = pd.read_parquet(DATA_FILE)
а а df["timestamp"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"])
а а df["date"] = df["timestamp"].dt.date
а а df.sort_values(["timestamp", "strike_offset"], inplace=True)
а а return df
def atm_oi(snap):
а а """ATM single strike OI only (offset = 0)."""
а а row = snap[snap["strike_offset"] == 0]
а а if row.empty:
а а а а return 0, 0
а а return int(row.iloc[0]["oi_call"]), int(row.iloc[0]["oi_put"])
def outer_oi(snap):
а а """
а а Outer strikes ONLY Ч ATM+1, ATM+2 call vs ATM-1, ATM-2 put.
а а ATM (offset 0) is NOT included here.
а а This captures the directional OI from traders 1-2 strikes away.
а а """
а а c = snap[snap["strike_offset"].isin([1, 2])]["oi_call"].sum()
а а p = snap[snap["strike_offset"].isin([-1, -2])]["oi_put"].sum()
а а return int(c), int(p)
def atm_ratio(atm_c, atm_p):
а а """Ratio extremity: max(put/call, call/put)."""
а а if atm_c == 0 or atm_p == 0:
а а а а return 0.0
а а return max(atm_p / atm_c, atm_c / atm_p)
def evaluate_entry(snap):
а а """
а а New dual-check entry evaluation.
а а Check A: ATM diff >= 20L AND direction consistent
а а Check B: Outer strikes diff >= 20L AND direction consistent
а а Both must pass AND agree on same direction.
а а Returns: (valid, direction, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p)
а а """
а а atm_c, а atm_p а = atm_oi(snap)
а а outer_c, outer_p = outer_oi(snap)
а а atm_diff а = abs(atm_c - atm_p)
а а outer_diff = abs(outer_c - outer_p)
а а # Both thresholds must be met
а а if atm_diff < ATM_THRESHOLD:
а а а а return False, None, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p
а а if outer_diff < OUTER_THRESHOLD:
а а а а return False, None, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p
а а # Both must agree on direction (lower OI side)
а а atm_dir а = "CALL" if atm_c а < atm_p а else "PUT"
а а outer_dir = "CALL" if outer_c < outer_p else "PUT"
а а if atm_dir != outer_dir:
а а а а return False, None, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p
а а # ATM ratio filter
а а ratio = atm_ratio(atm_c, atm_p)
а а if ratio < MIN_ATM_RATIO:
а а а а return False, None, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p
а а return True, atm_dir, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p
def check_premium_exit(entry_px, current_px, trail_on):
а а if current_px <= entry_px * (1 - SL_PCT):
а а а а return True, "SL_HIT", trail_on
а а if current_px >= entry_px * (1 + TARGET_PCT):
а а а а return True, "TARGET_HIT", trail_on
а а if current_px >= entry_px * (1 + TRAIL_TRIG_PCT):
а а а а trail_on = True
а а if trail_on and current_px <= entry_px * (1 + TRAIL_LOCK_PCT):
а а а а return True, "TRAIL_SL", trail_on
а а return False, None, trail_on
OFFSET_LABEL = {2: "ATM+2", 1: "ATM+1", 0: "ATM", -1: "ATM-1", -2: "ATM-2"}
def make_record(date, entry_ts, exit_ts, direction, entry_strike,
а а а а а а а а entry_px, exit_px, pnl, reason,
а а а а а а а а atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p,
а а а а а а а а open_ref, entry_spot, entry_offset,
а а а а а а а а trade_num=0, exit_snap=None):
а а """
а а exit_snap: the snapshot DataFrame at exit time Ч used to capture
а а а а а а а аexit-time ATM OI (offset 0) and outer OI (offsets ▒1,▒2).
а а """
а а ex_atm_c = ex_atm_p = ex_atm_diff = None
а а ex_outer_c = ex_outer_p = ex_outer_diff = None
а а ex_atm_strike = None
а а if exit_snap is not None and not exit_snap.empty:
а а а а # ATM strike price at exit
а а а а atm_row = exit_snap[exit_snap["strike_offset"] == 0]
а а а а if not atm_row.empty:
а а а а а а ex_atm_strike = float(atm_row.iloc[0]["strike"])
а а а а а а ex_atm_c = int(atm_row.iloc[0]["oi_call"])
а а а а а а ex_atm_p = int(atm_row.iloc[0]["oi_put"])
а а а а а а ex_atm_diff = abs(ex_atm_c - ex_atm_p)
а а а а # Outer OI at exit (offsets ▒1, ▒2, no ATM)
а а а а oc = exit_snap[exit_snap["strike_offset"].isin([1, 2])]["oi_call"].sum()
а а а а op = exit_snap[exit_snap["strike_offset"].isin([-1, -2])]["oi_put"].sum()
а а а а ex_outer_c = int(oc)
а а а а ex_outer_p = int(op)
а а а а ex_outer_diff = abs(ex_outer_c - ex_outer_p)
а а def _L(v):
а а а а return round(v / LAKH, 1) if v is not None else None
а а return {
а а а а "date": а а а а а а а date,
а а а а "day": а а а а а а а аpd.Timestamp(str(date)).day_name()[:3],
а а а а "trade_num": а а а а аtrade_num, а # 1 = first trade of day, 2 = second, 3 = third
а а а а "entry_time": а а а а entry_ts.strftime("%H:%M"),
а а а а "exit_time": а а а а аexit_ts.strftime("%H:%M") if exit_ts else None,
а а а а "direction": а а а а аdirection,
а а а а "entry_strike": а а а entry_strike,
а а а а "entry_offset": а а а OFFSET_LABEL.get(entry_offset, str(entry_offset)),
а а а а "entry_atm_call_L": а _L(atm_c),
а а а а "entry_atm_put_L": а а_L(atm_p),
а а а а "entry_atm_diff_L": а _L(abs(atm_c - atm_p)),
а а а а "entry_atm_lower": а а"CALL" if atm_c < atm_p else "PUT",
а а а а "entry_outer_call_L": _L(outer_c),
а а а а "entry_outer_put_L": а_L(outer_p),
а а а а "entry_outer_diff_L": _L(abs(outer_c - outer_p)),
а а а а "entry_outer_lower": а"CALL" if outer_c < outer_p else "PUT",
а а а а "atm_ratio": а а а а аround(atm_ratio(atm_c, atm_p), 2),
а а а а "open_ref": а а а а а round(open_ref, 1) if open_ref else None,
а а а а "entry_spot": а а а а round(entry_spot, 1),
а а а а "spot_vs_open": а а а round(entry_spot - open_ref, 1) if open_ref else None,
а а а а "entry_premium": а а аround(entry_px, 2),
а а а а "exit_premium": а а а round(exit_px, 2),
а а а а "pnl_per_lot": а а а аround(pnl, 2),
а а а а "exit_reason": а а а аreason,
а а а а "duration_min": а а а int((exit_ts - entry_ts).seconds / 60) if exit_ts else None,
а а а а # ?? Exit OI snapshot (ATM strike + call/put OI at exit time) ??????????
а а а а "exit_atm_strike": а аex_atm_strike,
а а а а "exit_atm_call_L": а а_L(ex_atm_c),
а а а а "exit_atm_put_L": а а _L(ex_atm_p),
а а а а "exit_atm_diff_L": а а_L(ex_atm_diff),
а а а а "exit_atm_lower": а а ("CALL" if ex_atm_c < ex_atm_p else "PUT") if ex_atm_c is not None else None,
а а а а "exit_outer_call_L": а_L(ex_outer_c),
а а а а "exit_outer_put_L": а _L(ex_outer_p),
а а а а "exit_outer_diff_L": а_L(ex_outer_diff),
а а а а "exit_outer_lower": а ("CALL" if ex_outer_c < ex_outer_p else "PUT") if ex_outer_c is not None else None,
а а }
# Core day loop
def backtest_day(day_df, date):
а а trades а а = []
а а timestamps = sorted(day_df["timestamp"].unique())
а а def snap(ts):
а а а а return day_df[day_df["timestamp"] == ts]
а а # Opening reference at 09:15
а а ts_open а = pd.Timestamp(str(date) + " 09:15:00")
а а open_snap = snap(ts_open)
а а if open_snap.empty and timestamps:
а а а а open_snap = day_df[day_df["timestamp"] == timestamps[0]]
а а open_ref = float(open_snap.iloc[0]["spot"]) if not open_snap.empty else None
а а in_trade а а а = False
а а entry_px а а а = entry_ts = direction = entry_strike = entry_offset = None
а а e_atm_c = e_atm_p = e_outer_c = e_outer_p = e_spot = None
а а trail_on а а а = False
а а oi_exit_consec = 0
а а e_trade_num а а= 0 а # trade number within the day (1, 2, 3)
а а day_pnl а а а= 0.0
а а trades_today = 0
а а reentry_after = None
а а for ts in timestamps:
а а а а t = ts.time()
а а а а if t < SCAN_START:
а а а а а а continue
а а а а # Hard exit
а а а а if t > HARD_EXIT:
а а а а а а if in_trade:
а а а а а а а а s а= snap(ts)
а а а а а а а а row = s[s["strike"] == entry_strike]
а а а а а а а а col = "close_call" if direction == "CALL" else "close_put"
а а а а а а а а px а= float(row.iloc[0][col]) if not row.empty else entry_px
а а а а а а а а pnl = (px - entry_px) * LOT
а а а а а а а а day_pnl += pnl
а а а а а а а а trades.append(make_record(
а а а а а а а а а а date, entry_ts, ts, direction, entry_strike,
а а а а а а а а а а entry_px, px, pnl, "HARD_EXIT",
а а а а а а а а а а e_atm_c, e_atm_p, e_outer_c, e_outer_p,
а а а а а а а а а а open_ref, e_spot, entry_offset,
а а а а а а а а а а trade_num=e_trade_num, exit_snap=s))
а а а а а а а а in_trade = False
а а а а а а break
а а а а s а а а а= snap(ts)
а а а а cur_spot = float(s.iloc[0]["spot"]) if not s.empty else np.nan
а а а а # IN TRADE Ч check exits every minute
а а а а if in_trade:
а а а а а а row = s[s["strike"] == entry_strike]
а а а а а а if row.empty:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а col а а а а= "close_call" if direction == "CALL" else "close_put"
а а а а а а current_px = float(row.iloc[0][col])
а а а а а а if np.isnan(current_px):
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а # Premium exits (fire any time)
а а а а а а should_exit, reason, trail_on = check_premium_exit(
а а а а а а а а entry_px, current_px, trail_on)
а а а а а а if should_exit:
а а а а а а а а pnl = (current_px - entry_px) * LOT
а а а а а а а а day_pnl += pnl
а а а а а а а а trades.append(make_record(
а а а а а а а а а а date, entry_ts, ts, direction, entry_strike,
а а а а а а а а а а entry_px, current_px, pnl, reason,
а а а а а а а а а а e_atm_c, e_atm_p, e_outer_c, e_outer_p,
а а а а а а а а а а open_ref, e_spot, entry_offset,
а а а а а а а а а а trade_num=e_trade_num, exit_snap=s))
а а а а а а а а in_trade а а а = False
а а а а а а а а trail_on а а а = False
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec = 0
а а а а а а а а trades_today а+= 1
а а а а а а а а reentry_after а= ts + pd.Timedelta(minutes=REENTRY_COOLDOWN)
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а # OI stay-in check Ч recalculate ATM every minute
а а а а а а # Rule: exit when ATM anchor fails (unchanged from v15)
а а а а а а # Outer-alone drop is ignored just like sum-alone was in v15
а а а а а а atm_c2, а atm_p2 а = atm_oi(snap(ts))
а а а а а а outer_c2, outer_p2 = outer_oi(snap(ts))
а а а а а а atm_diff2 а = abs(atm_c2 - atm_p2)
а а а а а а outer_diff2 = abs(outer_c2 - outer_p2)
а а а а а а atm_dir2 а а= "CALL" if atm_c2 а < atm_p2 а else "PUT"
а а а а а а outer_dir2 а= "CALL" if outer_c2 < outer_p2 else "PUT"
а а а а а а atm_ok а = (atm_diff2 а >= ATM_THRESHOLD) а and (atm_dir2 а == direction)
а а а а а а outer_ok = (outer_diff2 >= OUTER_THRESHOLD) and (outer_dir2 == direction)
а а а а а а # Exit when ATM anchor fails (outer-alone drop = ignored, stay in)
а а а а а а if atm_ok and not outer_ok:
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec = 0 а а а а а# outer fell but ATM holds Ч stay
а а а а а а elif not atm_ok:
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec += 1 а а а а # ATM failed
а а а а а а elif atm_dir2 != direction or outer_dir2 != direction:
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec += 1 а а а а # direction flip
а а а а а а else:
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec = 0
а а а а а а if oi_exit_consec >= EXIT_PERSIST:
а а а а а а а а pnl = (current_px - entry_px) * LOT
а а а а а а а а day_pnl += pnl
а а а а а а а а if atm_diff2 < ATM_THRESHOLD and outer_diff2 < OUTER_THRESHOLD:
а а а а а а а а а а exit_reason = "OI_EXIT_BOTH_FELL"
а а а а а а а а elif atm_diff2 < ATM_THRESHOLD:
а а а а а а а а а а exit_reason = "OI_EXIT_ATM_FELL"
а а а а а а а а else:
а а а а а а а а а а exit_reason = "OI_EXIT_DIR_FLIP"
а а а а а а а а trades.append(make_record(
а а а а а а а а а а date, entry_ts, ts, direction, entry_strike,
а а а а а а а а а а entry_px, current_px, pnl, exit_reason,
а а а а а а а а а а e_atm_c, e_atm_p, e_outer_c, e_outer_p,
а а а а а а а а а а open_ref, e_spot, entry_offset,
а а а а а а а а а а trade_num=e_trade_num, exit_snap=s))
а а а а а а а а in_trade а а а = False
а а а а а а а а trail_on а а а = False
а а а а а а а а oi_exit_consec = 0
а а а а а а а а trades_today а+= 1
а а а а а а а а reentry_after а= ts + pd.Timedelta(minutes=REENTRY_COOLDOWN)
а а а а # NOT IN TRADE Ч scan for entry
а а а а else:
а а а а а а if t > ENTRY_CUTOFF:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а if trades_today >= MAX_TRADES_DAY:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а if day_pnl <= DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а if reentry_after and ts < reentry_after:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а # Block hour 10:00-10:59
а а а а а а if BLOCK_HOUR_START <= t <= BLOCK_HOUR_END:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а valid, sig_dir, atm_c, atm_p, outer_c, outer_p = evaluate_entry(s)
а а а а а а if not valid:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а # ?? Pure-number Filter A: outer/atm ratio > 5 ? anomaly, skip ?????
а а а а а а atm_diff_now а = abs(atm_c - atm_p)
а а а а а а outer_diff_now = abs(outer_c - outer_p)
а а а а а а if atm_diff_now > 0 and (outer_diff_now / atm_diff_now) > MAX_OUTER_ATM_RATIO:
а а а а а а а а continue а # outer OI >5x ATM = noise signal, not genuine divergence
а а а а а а off = 2 if sig_dir == "CALL" else -2
а а а а а а row = s[s["strike_offset"] == off]
а а а а а а if row.empty:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а col = "close_call" if sig_dir == "CALL" else "close_put"
а а а а а а px а= float(row.iloc[0][col])
а а а а а а if np.isnan(px) or px < MIN_PREMIUM:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а # ?? Pure-number Filter B: premium > 180 ? too expensive ???????????
а а а а а а # Losers avg -670 here vs winners avg +268. Net save: +1,608.
а а а а а а if px > MAX_ENTRY_PREMIUM:
а а а а а а а а continue
а а а а а а entry_px а а а = px
а а а а а а entry_ts а а а = ts
а а а а а а direction а а а= sig_dir
а а а а а а entry_strike а = float(row.iloc[0]["strike"])
а а а а а а entry_offset а = off
а а а а а а e_atm_c, e_atm_p а а = atm_c, atm_p
а а а а а а e_outer_c, e_outer_p = outer_c, outer_p
а а а а а а e_spot а а а а = cur_spot
а а а а а а e_trade_num а а= trades_today + 1 а # 1 = first, 2 = second, 3 = third
а а а а а а in_trade а а а = True
а а а а а а trail_on а а а = False
а а а а а а oi_exit_consec = 0
а а return trades
# Runner + Report
def run_backtest(df):
а а all_trades = []
а а dates = sorted(df["date"].unique())
а а print(f"Running v23 on {len(dates)} days")
а а print(f" аEntry: ATM diff>=20L AND Outer (+-1,+-2) diff>=20L, same direction, ratio>=1.5")
а а print(f" аHour-10 BLOCKED | outer/atm <= {MAX_OUTER_ATM_RATIO} | premium <= {MAX_ENTRY_PREMIUM}")
а а print(f" аEntry strike: ATM+/-2 | SL {int(SL_PCT*100)}% | Tgt {int(TARGET_PCT*100)}%")
а а print()
а а for d in dates:
а а а а day_df = df[df["date"] == d].copy()
а а а а trades = backtest_day(day_df, d)
а а а а day_pnl = sum(tr["pnl_per_lot"] for tr in trades)
а а а а dow = pd.Timestamp(str(d)).day_name()[:3]
а а а а flag = " а<<< NEGATIVE" if day_pnl < 0 else ""
а а а а print(f" а{d} ({dow}) аtrades={len(trades):2d} аP&L=INR {day_pnl:>10,.0f}{flag}")
а а а а all_trades.extend(trades)
а а return pd.DataFrame(all_trades)
def print_summary(df, dates_count):
а а if df.empty:
а а а а print("No trades generated.")
а а а а return None
а а wins а = df[df["pnl_per_lot"] > 0]
а а losses = df[df["pnl_per_lot"] <= 0]
а а n а = len(df)
а а gp а= wins["pnl_per_lot"].sum()
а а gl а= abs(losses["pnl_per_lot"].sum())
а а net = df["pnl_per_lot"].sum()
а а wr а= len(wins) / n * 100
а а pf а= gp / gl if gl > 0 else float("inf")
а а aw а= wins["pnl_per_lot"].mean() if len(wins) else 0
